chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 19 & 24 of 2009 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 92 of 2015. (U/O 1 Rule 10) 2. For hearing of Main Petition. 24.02.2026. Mr. Waqas Shaikh, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Mirza Mahmood Ahmed, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Salim Salam Ansari, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Waris Ali, Advocate for Respondent. ********** Mr. Waqas Shaikh, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Mirza Mahmood Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner, who is currently not available in Karachi. Perusal of the Order Sheets shows that the Petitioner does not seem to be pursuing these matters, which have remained pending since 2009. Accordingly, the same are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to place copy of this order in the connected Petition. JUDGE AYAZ
